name: Patchwork Borough
theme: A mixed-neighborhood city builder clicker based on the house art set in houses.jpg.
goalText: Grow a small borough into a city worth remembering.

artReference.note: Sprite order and building flavor map to the visible house, dome, factory, manor, cabin, and bungalow silhouettes.

pacing.firstMinuteGoal: Buy 3 starter homes and the first manual click upgrade.
pacing.midgameShift: Players transition from cottage taxes into materials and appeal management.
pacing.lateGameIdentity: Premium districts convert appeal into strong city-wide tax growth.
